name: Percy Goetschius
abstract: Percy Goetschius (August 10, 1853 – October 29, 1943) was an American composer, music theorist, and teacher who won international fame in the teaching of composition and music theory.

about_quotes.speaker: Toots Thielemans
about_quotes.evidence: I wanted to learn harmony and to give a name, to be able to give a name to what I was playing. ... there was a treatise of harmony. Percy Goetschius. ... I borrowed that book
about_quotes.doc_title: Toots Thielemans — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
